title: Filipino Menudo Breakfast Skillet
description: A hearty breakfast skillet filled with spicy Filipino menudo, crispy bacon, and scrambled eggs.

ingredients.name: Menudo
ingredients.notes: Filipino menudo, cooked according to package instructions

instructions: Cook the bacon in a large skillet over medium heat until crispy.
Remove the bacon from the skillet and set aside.
In the same skillet, sauté the chopped onion and minced garlic until softened.
Add the cooked menudo to the skillet and stir to combine with the onion and garlic.
Create 4 wells in the menudo mixture and crack an egg into each well.
Scramble the eggs to desired doneness.
Stir the eggs into the menudo mixture and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the menudo breakfast skillet hot, garnished with crispy bacon.
